title: Create durable advanced program packets for AMP48 through AMP55
persona: Transformation lead with finance, supplier, training, knowledge, document, telemetry, and analytics review responsibilities
steps: Open each AMP48-AMP55 workspace from the Assistant subnav.
Review the live score, source signals, risk assessment, recommendations, artifact, approval route, and rollback plan.
expected: Each workspace persists an AssistantAdvancedProgramPacket row with ampNumber 48 through 55 and a distinct programKey.

sourceSummaryJson includes program-specific evidence such as POs, invoice intakes, supplier documents, assistant evidence records, playbooks, review examples, action queue items, audit events, and operational exceptions.
recommendationJson and rollbackPlanJson include human approval requirements and no-silent-mutation guardrails.
No POs, invoices, suppliers, training state, SOPs, files, extracted fields, claims, CAPA records, asset controls, metric definitions, dashboards, or assistant answers are changed automatically.

title: Queue human review for spend, supplier resilience, SOP, document, vision, telemetry, and metrics packets
steps: Create or select a DRAFT AMP48-AMP55 packet.
Add a review note explaining the intended downstream decision.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED and records actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with an AMP-specific actionKind such as assistant_amp48_review or assistant_amp55_review.
An AssistantAuditEvent states that downstream operational, knowledge, document, telemetry, or metric records were not mutated automatically.

title: Review artifacts preserve approval, provenance, privacy, and rollback controls
steps: Open an AMP48-AMP55 packet with active risks.
Inspect artifactJson, approvalPlanJson, recommendationJson, and rollbackPlanJson.
Confirm the packet can be queued without executing downstream changes.
expected: artifactJson identifies the program-specific review packet and export-ready evidence sections.
approvalPlanJson identifies the required owner groups before execution.
rollbackPlanJson preserves source records and requires a new packet when source evidence materially changes.
Privacy-sensitive areas such as workforce training, documents, vision evidence, and governed metrics remain review-only until a human approves downstream work.
